checks.name: schema_completeness
checks.detail: All required payload fields present with detailed design_highlights

checks.name: flow_integrity
checks.detail: 3 flows (daily detection 19 edges, persistent warning escalation 8 edges, error recovery 12 edges) — all properly connected

checks.name: trigger_validity
checks.detail: Two schedule triggers: daily 9AM and afternoon 2PM weekdays — valid crons matching dual-check workflow

checks.name: connector_role_alignment
checks.detail: amplitude (analytics) swappable to mixpanel, slack (chat_messaging), linear (project_tracking) — all roles valid

checks.name: adoption_question_fitness
checks.detail: 4 adoption_questions added covering Slack channel, Linear team/label IDs, and critical threshold

checks.name: default_value_coverage
checks.detail: Slack channel (#product-signals) and threshold (25%) have defaults. Linear IDs require user input.

checks.name: prompt_quality
checks.detail: Identity 75w, instructions 700w+ with 7 steps, tool guidance with Amplitude/Slack/Linear API endpoints, 3 examples (critical/warning/all-clear), comprehensive error handling

dimensions.name: Prompt Completeness
dimensions.rationale: Identity 75w, instructions cover 7 detailed steps with severity classification table, EWMA baseline computation, and Linear GraphQL mutations. Tool guidance includes specific API endpoints. 3 examples covering critical funnel drop, feature spike, and all-clear Monday. Error handling covers all 3 APIs plus data quality.

dimensions.name: Tool-Prompt Alignment
dimensions.rationale: http_request for Amplitude, Slack, Linear. file_read/file_write for baselines and signal history. Linear is correctly identified as GraphQL-only. All tools match.

dimensions.name: Trigger Coherence
dimensions.rationale: Dual schedule: morning 9AM full analysis and afternoon 2PM recheck on weekdays. Both crons are valid and the afternoon recheck is a sophisticated pattern.

dimensions.name: Connector Coverage
dimensions.rationale: All 3 connectors well-defined. Amplitude connector lacks builtin but is swappable to mixpanel via analytics role. Linear uses GraphQL which is accurately documented.

dimensions.name: Memory Design
dimensions.rationale: EWMA baselines with alpha=0.1 for gradual adaptation. Signal history tracks persistence across runs for warning escalation. Run log for debugging. Excellent stateful design.

dimensions.name: Error Handling
dimensions.rationale: Covers Amplitude (auth, rate limit, 5xx), Slack (channel_not_found, rate limit, invalid blocks), Linear (auth, duplicates). Zero-event anomaly flagged as data pipeline issue. Corrupted baselines trigger regeneration.

dimensions.name: Use Case Fidelity
dimensions.rationale: 3 flows comprehensively cover daily detection with 16 nodes including duplicate detection, persistent warning escalation with 3-day threshold, and error recovery with data quality handling.

dimensions.name: Value Clarity
dimensions.rationale: Clear value: early-warning system for product signals that catches issues before they show up in dashboards, with automatic investigation ticket creation.

dimensions.name: Execution Feasibility
dimensions.rationale: Amplitude lacks a builtin connector (swappable to mixpanel). Linear and Slack are available. Amplitude API requires project-level API key and Secret Key setup. The swap to Mixpanel requires prompt adjustment.

dimensions.name: Differentiation
dimensions.rationale: Three-tier severity classification, EWMA baselines, persistent warning escalation to Linear tickets, and duplicate detection go significantly beyond simple threshold alerting.

dimensions.name: Variable Necessity
dimensions.rationale: All 4 adoption questions are necessary. Linear team/label IDs are required for ticket creation. Critical threshold enables sensitivity tuning.

dimensions.name: Default Quality
dimensions.rationale: Slack channel and critical threshold have good defaults. Linear team ID and label ID have no defaults — must be discovered via API query.

issues: No adoption_questions existed — connectors need user-specific configuration
Amplitude connector has no builtin definition — requires swap to mixpanel or user must provide custom connector
Linear team_id and label_id have no defaults and require API discovery steps

template: Added 4 adoption_questions: slack_product_channel, linear_team_id, linear_label_id, critical_threshold
